gold.rationale: 文本把“单杆153分且被官方确认为世界纪录/改写纪录”描述为已坐实的赛事事实，但所用关键“证据图”存在明显后期添加与改写痕迹，且其余配图并不能共同支撑“153世界纪录”这一核心结论，导致主要印象被误导。

atomic_points.post_summary: 罗尼·奥沙利文在2026斯诺克世界公开赛四分之一决赛对阵瑞恩·戴的比赛中完成单杆153分，改写世界纪录。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 3月20日下午，江西上饶玉山体育中心内，现场大屏的单杆计分在掌声中停在“153”。
atoms: The event took place on the afternoon of March 20.
The venue is the Yushan Sports Center in Shangrao, Jiangxi.
The on-site scoreboard stopped at 153.
The scoreboard stopped while the audience was clapping.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 转播信号字幕与赛事组委会信息几乎同时打出“MAX BREAK 153 / World Record”，确认罗尼·奥沙利文（Ronnie O'Sullivan）在对阵瑞恩·戴（Ryan Day）的比赛开局阶段、第一局完成单杆153分清台，世界斯诺克纪录就此改写，并被形容为“147之后的新天花板”。
atoms: Broadcast subtitles displayed 'MAX BREAK 153 / World Record'.
Event committee information displayed 'MAX BREAK 153 / World Record'.
Ronnie O'Sullivan played against Ryan Day.
Ronnie O'Sullivan completed a 153 break in the first frame.
Ronnie O'Sullivan completed the break in the early stage of the match.
The world snooker record was rewritten.
The 153 break is described as a new ceiling after 147.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 这场对决是2026斯诺克世界公开赛四分之一决赛，地点在江西上饶玉山体育中心，赛事赛期为3月16日至22日。
atoms: The match was the quarter-final of the 2026 Snooker World Open.
The location was the Yushan Sports Center in Shangrao, Jiangxi.
The tournament dates were from March 16 to March 22.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 奥沙利文因“火箭”绰号被球迷熟知，长期以强攻节奏和连续得分能力见长；瑞恩·戴则以防守和中长台稳定著称。
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan is known by the nickname 'Rocket'.
Ronnie O'Sullivan is known for strong attacking rhythm.
Ronnie O'Sullivan is known for continuous scoring ability.
Ryan Day is known for defense.
Ryan Day is known for stability on middle tables.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 两人在玉山展开八强战，开局不久就出现了决定性的名场面。
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan and Ryan Day played an eight-strong match in Yushan.
A decisive famous scene appeared early in the match.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 第一局开球后，台面很快变得复杂。
atoms: The table situation became complex after the first frame break.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 奥沙利文拿到上手机会后迅速组织进攻：他先处理贴库红球，随后借助黑球点位的细微调整，把母球控制在中台区域，连续多次以黑球作为高分彩球选择拉开分差。
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan gained the break.
Ronnie O'Sullivan organized an attack quickly.
Ronnie O'Sullivan first handled the red ball near the cushion.
Ronnie O'Sullivan adjusted the black ball position slightly.
Ronnie O'Sullivan controlled the cue ball in the middle table area.
Ronnie O'Sullivan used the black ball as a high-scoring object ball multiple times.
Ronnie O'Sullivan increased the score difference.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 转播画面显示，中盘阶段他通过两次精准走位把散开的红球重新“串”回得分节奏，几次关键薄球进攻都以小角度推进袋口完成。
atoms: The broadcast showed Ronnie O'Sullivan's actions in the middle stage.
Ronnie O'Sullivan made two precise positionings.
Ronnie O'Sullivan reconnected scattered red balls to the scoring rhythm.
Ronnie O'Sullivan made several key thin ball attacks.
Ronnie O'Sullivan completed these attacks with small angles into the pockets.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 进入清台阶段后，他的路线选择更直接，红球与高分彩球的衔接几乎没有停顿，母球多次穿越中线回到黑球点附近，形成连贯的高分循环。
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan's route selection became more direct in the clear-out stage.
The connection between red balls and high-scoring object balls had almost no pause.
The cue ball crossed the middle line multiple times.
The cue ball returned near the black ball position.
A continuous high-scoring cycle was formed.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 最后一颗黑球落袋，现场裁判随即示意计分确认，计分牌跳至“153”，局分也同步在大屏更新。
atoms: The last black ball fell into the pocket.
The on-site referee signaled for score confirmation.
The scoreboard jumped to 153.
The frame score was updated on the big screen simultaneously.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 观众席先短暂安静，随后起立鼓掌；有球迷举起手机对准大屏和转播字幕条拍摄，现场播报员也第一时间跟进提示“153”的单杆纪录。
atoms: The audience was briefly silent first.
The audience then stood up and clapped.
Some fans held up phones to film the big screen and broadcast subtitles.
The on-site announcer immediately mentioned the 153 break record.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 现场多图快讯显示，一张转播截图的条形字幕为“MAX BREAK 153 / World Record”，选手信息栏标注对阵“Ronnie O'Sullivan vs Ryan Day”；另一张来自场馆大屏的远景照片则显示单杆纪录栏仍停留在“147”的历史提示位，局分也呈现为另一组数字。
atoms: A broadcast screenshot showed the subtitle 'MAX BREAK 153 / World Record'.
The player info bar showed 'Ronnie O'Sullivan vs Ryan Day'.
A distant photo from the venue big screen showed the break record column still at '147'.
The frame score showed another set of numbers on the distant photo.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 两者在画面时间码与转播切换上存在差异，但转播方随后回放时仍持续以“153”作为本局关键数据呈现。
atoms: There were differences in the video timecode and broadcast switch between the two images.
The broadcast later replayed the match.
The broadcast continued to present '153' as the key data for the frame.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在斯诺克项目中，常见的满分杆为147分，职业赛场长期把它视作单杆得分的标志性上限，高分单杆在正式比赛中并不多见。
atoms: The common maximum break in snooker is 147 points.
The professional snooker court has long regarded 147 as the landmark upper limit.
High-scoring breaks are not common in formal matches.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 此次世界公开赛出现的“153”，被转播方与赛事信息系统写入即时数据，并在现场大屏和信号字幕中反复出现。
atoms: The '153' break appeared in this World Open.
The broadcast and event information system wrote '153' into immediate data.
'153' appeared repeatedly on the on-site big screen and signal subtitles.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 关于单杆“上限”的讨论，业内一直存在“理论更高分”的说法，例如在特殊开局条件下，分数可能触及更高数字。
atoms: There is discussion about the 'upper limit' of breaks in the industry.
There is a theory that higher scores are possible.
Under special opening conditions, scores might reach higher numbers.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 但在本场比赛里，奥沙利文以单杆153分在正式对局中完成清台，并被直接写入赛事纪录栏，成为玉山现场观众见证的“刷新理论极限”的一杆。
atoms: In this match, Ronnie O'Sullivan completed a clear-out with a 153 break in a formal game.
The 153 break was directly written into the event record column.
The 153 break became a 'breaking the theoretical limit' moment witnessed by Yushan audience.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多位现场解说在回放环节提到，147依旧是传统标尺，但153已经以官方记录的形式进入职业比赛的高分序列。
atoms: Several on-site commentators mentioned during the replay.
147 remains the traditional standard.
153 has entered the high-score sequence of professional matches in the form of official records.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 赛后混采区，奥沙利文接受转播方简短采访时说，第一局上手后他只想着把节奏打出来，“台面给了进攻空间，我就是按自己的方式去处理每一颗球。”
atoms: After the match, Ronnie O'Sullivan gave a brief interview to the broadcaster.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said he only wanted to play the rhythm after gaining the break.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said the table gave him attacking space.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said he handled every ball in his own way.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 谈到大屏定格的153分，他表示这类分数“可遇不可求”，更重要的是比赛还在继续，需要把注意力放在后面的局数与对抗上。
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan talked about the 153 break fixed on the big screen.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said such scores are 'hard to encounter'.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said the match continues.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said attention should be focused on subsequent frames and confrontation.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 他也提到玉山赛场氛围很强，“观众的反应会让人更专注。”
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan mentioned the atmosphere at the Yushan venue is strong.
Ronnie O'Sullivan said the audience reaction makes him more focused.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 瑞恩·戴在采访中回顾那一局时表示，开局阶段给了对手连续得分的机会，“他一旦进入手感就很难阻止”，接下来会在防守和开球质量上做调整。
atoms: Ryan Day reviewed the frame in an interview.
Ryan Day said the opening stage gave the opponent chances for continuous scoring.
Ryan Day said it is hard to stop him once he enters the rhythm.
Ryan Day said he will adjust defense and opening ball quality next.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 随着这杆单杆153分被赛事系统记录、并在转播画面中多次回放，本届世界公开赛在玉山的关注度被进一步推高。
atoms: The 153 break was recorded by the event system.
The 153 break was replayed multiple times in the broadcast.
The attention to this World Open in Yushan was further increased.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 赛事组委会工作人员表示，将把该局关键球的多机位画面纳入官方集锦，并在场馆互动区同步展示大屏定格瞬间。
atoms: Event committee staff stated they will include multi-camera footage of the key ball in the official highlight reel.
The event committee will display the big screen frozen moment simultaneously in the venue interaction area.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 奥沙利文晋级后的半决赛对阵以及决赛席位之争，将在随后赛程中继续推进。
atoms: Ronnie O'Sullivan advanced to the semi-finals.
The semi-final matchups and final berth competition will continue in the subsequent schedule.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 按赛期安排，世界公开赛将于3月16日至22日完成全部轮次，半决赛与决赛阶段将成为争冠关键窗口。
atoms: According to the schedule, the World Open will complete all rounds from March 16 to March 22.
The semi-final and final stages will become key windows for the championship.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多位解说认为，“火箭”的进攻效率和连续得分能力仍是他在玉山冲击冠军的重要砝码，而对手们也会在后续局数中更谨慎地控制开局与安全球质量，尽量避免再给出一杆制胜的上手机会。
atoms: Several commentators believe Ronnie O'Sullivan's attacking efficiency and continuous scoring ability are important assets for him to win the championship in Yushan.
Opponents will be more cautious in controlling opening balls and safety ball quality in subsequent frames.
Opponents will try to avoid giving Ronnie O'Sullivan a winning break opportunity.

paragraph_level: Ronnie O'Sullivan achieved a 153 break in the first frame against Ryan Day at the 2026 Snooker World Open quarter-final, rewriting the world record.
The 153 break is described as a new ceiling after the traditional 147 maximum.
Ronnie O'Sullivan utilized precise cue ball control and black ball positioning to build the break.
The broadcast and event system officially recorded the 153 break, despite some initial visual discrepancies in venue photos.
Ronnie O'Sullivan stated that the strong atmosphere at Yushan helped him focus during the match.
Ryan Day admitted he struggled to stop Ronnie O'Sullivan once he entered his rhythm in the opening stage.
The event committee plans to include multi-camera footage of the 153 break in the official highlight reel.
Commentators believe Ronnie O'Sullivan's attacking efficiency remains crucial for his championship run in Yushan.

retrieved_evidence.text: 罗尼·奥沙利文在2026年世界公开赛对阵瑞恩·戴的比赛中完成单杆153分后，引发了斯诺克界广泛关注。近日在赛事转播与技术统计中，官方比分条上醒目标注“153”和“World Record”等字样，被解读为对这一成绩的权威确认。据赛事相关人士介绍，这杆153分不仅超越传统认知中的147分“满分杆”，还被视作刷新理论最高分上限的重要时刻，进一步巩固了奥沙利文在斯诺克历史中的地位。

【#火箭单杆153可遇而不可求##火箭说在世之人很难打破单杆153纪录#】

3月20日下午，在江西上饶玉山进行的2026斯诺克世界公开赛一场1/4半决赛中，斯诺克界的传奇人物罗尼·奥沙利文创造了一项世界斯诺克的历史纪录，他在对阵瑞恩·戴的第一局比赛中打出了单杆153分，只比理论上能够达到的最高分上限差了 ​​​
2026世界公开赛被安排在江西玉山进行，场馆内设置多张标准斯诺克球台，周围环绕看台与商业广告牌，营造出职业排名赛的典型氛围。据现场观众和裁判介绍，奥沙利文与瑞恩·戴的对局在满座观众的注视下进行，场内灯光集中投射在球台上，四周相对昏暗，以突出比赛焦点。随着单杆得分不断累积，现场安静到几乎只能听到球击打库边的声音，直至153分确认后，掌声与欢呼声在场馆内持续回荡。

斯诺克历史上，147分长期被视为“满分杆”的象征，克雷格·贝利、斯蒂芬·亨德利以及奥沙利文本人都曾在重大赛事中打出经典147分，相关转播资料在斯诺克爱好者中广为流传。近年来，随着对自由球、犯规加分等规则细节的深入研究，一些裁判与技术专家提出理论上存在高于147分的得分上限。2026年奥沙利文在世界公开赛中打出并被官方确认的153分，被不少观察者视为对传统147分神话的突破，引发关于“最大单杆得分”新标准的讨论。
赛事相关人员近日证实，在2026斯诺克世界公开赛的首轮或次轮阶段，罗尼·奥沙利文将与来自威尔士的职业球员瑞恩·戴展开对决。瑞恩·戴长期征战职业赛场，多次在排名赛中打入后期阶段，而奥沙利文则以丰富的大赛经验和极强的进攻能力见长。分析人士认为，两人交锋具有一定看点，预计比赛将吸引不少现场及电视观众关注。
2026斯诺克世界公开赛连续多日在江西上饶玉山进行，主赛场周边酒店与餐饮设施在3月中旬已迎来集中客流。赛事组委会透露，本届赛事继续选择玉山作为承办地，一方面是考虑到当地此前多次举办大型斯诺克赛事所积累的经验，另一方面也看重区域交通条件与场馆硬件配套。当地文旅部门称，将借赛事期间的客流，推出一批短途旅游线路，相关活动仍在筹划之中。
业内人士在谈及此次比赛时指出，斯诺克项目中单杆147分被普遍视为常见意义上的满分杆，而接近或达到这一分数的极高分单杆，在职业赛场上出现频率总体仍然不高。奥沙利文以敏锐的走位判断和强烈的进攻倾向著称，职业生涯已多次完成147分或其他高分单杆。相关评论认为，在2026斯诺克世界公开赛上，他与瑞恩·戴开局阶段的对攻，有望为观众带来高质量的局面表现，外界也在关注是否会出现亮眼的高分单杆。
据现场工作人员介绍，罗尼·奥沙利文对阵瑞恩·戴的比赛，将在双方交锋的第一局就进入紧张阶段，成为观察整场走势的关键窗口。消息人士称，开局阶段的首局将采用常规局制，双方需要在有限的机会中迅速进入状态。教练和评论员普遍认为，如果奥沙利文能够在第一局凭借主动进攻取得领先，将在心理和节奏上获得一定优势，给对手施加压力。
据赛事公告，本次比赛全称为“2026斯诺克世界公开赛”，为当赛季职业斯诺克巡回赛的重要排名赛之一。组委会负责人介绍，赛事将邀请多名世界排名靠前的选手参赛，并通过多轮淘汰赛决出最终冠军。业内人士指出，世界公开赛在历届比赛中曾见证多次高分单杆和关键翻盘，是球员争取积分和荣誉的重要平台，本届赛事的对阵签表与奖金结构将在赛前陆续公布。
据赛事筹备人员近日介绍，英国斯诺克名将罗尼·奥沙利文确认将参加在江西上饶玉山举办的2026斯诺克世界公开赛。奥沙利文因击球节奏极快、进攻主动而获得“火箭”这一绰号，在职业生涯中多次打出单杆147分，被业内普遍视为斯诺克历史上的传奇人物之一。组织方表示，他的到来预计将显著提升赛事关注度，当地相关部门已着手完善安保、交通和接待等配套安排。
在这场世界公开赛对局期间，场边电子计分牌和转播中的比分条持续滚动显示奥沙利文与瑞恩·戴的局分和单杆得分，记录每一次上手和失误。据技术官员介绍，这类计分系统通常同步赛事官方数据，以确保每一局成绩的准确性和可追溯性。尽管部分过程记录仅呈现普通单杆得分或局分变化，但与赛后公布的单杆153分统计共同构成完整赛况资料，为最终确认这一世界纪录提供了基础信息来源。
根据赛事运营方公布的初步日程，罗尼·奥沙利文的首秀暂定于2026年3月20日下午在2026斯诺克世界公开赛的正赛阶段进行。知情人士称，当天比赛将安排在主场馆的一个核心时段，以方便现场观众和电视转播收看。当地体育部门表示，3月中旬将迎来观赛人流高峰，相关部门已提前部署场馆引导和志愿服务工作，以保障比赛顺利进行。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the event details but significantly inflates the magnitude of the record claim and misattributes the specific quote to the opponent.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: Post claims the 153 break is a 'new ceiling after 147' and 'rewrote the world record' (id=src_255_1), whereas evidence only states it is 'one point less than the theoretical maximum' and implies 147 is the common standard (id=news_255_5, id=news_255_7).
t2_problematic_subclaims: Claimed as 'rewriting the world record' and 'new ceiling after 147' when evidence only says it is one point below theoretical maximum.
Claimed Ryan Day said 'once he enters rhythm it is hard to stop' when evidence attributes this sentiment to commentators, not Ryan Day himself.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate regarding facts but exaggerates the significance of the score as a 'world record' and misquotes the opponent's reaction.

images.explanation: The image is a genuine press photo of Ronnie O'Sullivan taking a shot, but it has been edited with a large news-style lower-third graphic overlay to claim the specific event details.

judge.level3_rationale: 虽然奥沙利文确实打出153分，但文本将其错误地描述为改写世界纪录并称为147后的新天花板，且将解说观点误植为瑞恩·戴的采访原话，导致核心事实严重失真。
judge.reasoning_trace: 文本夸大了153分的意义（非世界纪录），并错误归因了采访内容，图片虽有编辑但符合语境。
judge.core_claim: 罗尼·奥沙利文在2026斯诺克世界公开赛对阵瑞恩·戴的比赛中完成单杆153分，改写世界纪录，被形容为“147之后的新天花板”。
key_subclaims: 奥沙利文在2026斯诺克世界公开赛四分之一决赛对阵瑞恩·戴的比赛中完成单杆153分。
该成绩被形容为“147之后的新天花板”并改写世界纪录。
瑞恩·戴在采访中表示“他一旦进入手感就很难阻止”。
现场大屏和转播字幕显示“MAX BREAK 153 / World Record”。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 奥沙利文在2026斯诺克世界公开赛四分之一决赛对阵瑞恩·戴的比赛中完成单杆153分。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[1]和[2]确认了比赛时间、地点、对手及153分的成绩。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 该成绩被形容为“147之后的新天花板”并改写世界纪录。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[2]明确指出153分“只比理论上能够达到的最高分上限差了一点”，并未改写世界纪录，且证据[4]提到147分是传统满分杆，153分是对此的突破但非“新天花板”的官方定论，原文表述存在夸大。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 瑞恩·戴在采访中表示“他一旦进入手感就很难阻止”。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[2]显示该引语是“#火箭说在世之人很难打破单杆153纪录#”话题下的评论或解说观点，而非瑞恩·戴本人的采访原话。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 现场大屏和转播字幕显示“MAX BREAK 153 / World Record”。
subclaim_findings.note: 图片1中的字幕条清晰显示了该信息。

judge.verdict_reasoning: 文本核心关于153分发生的描述属实，但将“理论极限的突破”夸大表述为“改写世界纪录”和“147之后的新天花板”，且错误地将解说观点归为瑞恩·戴的采访原话。图片存在视觉编辑（V2）以强调新闻点，但图文语义一致。由于存在关键事实夸大和归因错误，核心表达不成立。

image_findings.explanation: 图片底部叠加了“World Open 2026”和“BREAK 153 World Record”的蓝色横幅，属于视觉编辑（V2），用于强调新闻点。
图片显示奥沙利文赛后微笑，与文中描述的反应一致，无编辑痕迹。
图片显示奥沙利文持球杆准备击球，背景有“SNOOKER WORLD OPEN”字样，无编辑痕迹。
图片显示奥沙利文庆祝，背景有观众，无编辑痕迹。
